gt_provenance.details: Dataset label files provide px/py targets, but weak strata and RA projection are diagnostic proxies rather than calibrated RA ground truth.

score_normalization.details: Fixed-PFA metrics use validation quantiles and count denominators; D1A-style local projection is frame-percentile/local-contrast sanity and must not be treated as fixed-PFA performance.

result_existence.details: Required CSV/JSON/Markdown files exist and key numbers match.

dead_code.details: Metric functions are called by d5c_ra_rca_self_check.py and row counts match the sweep design.

scope.details: Reports keep the claim ceiling at RA projection/mapping/mask diagnostic proxy and do not claim RA method performance.

ra_specific.details: Checks cover formula/unit/sign/bin, FFT axis, RX/virtual antenna dimension, mask width, weak subset, and D1A/D5C alignment. Remaining warnings are rough RA smoke map, angle-axis geometry mismatch, and suspicious unshifted-bin empirical row.

action_items.item: Add explicit eval_type: diagnostic_proxy to reports/config.
Add candidate and bin_mode to D1A-vs-D5C consistency table.
Do not use D1A-style local hit rates as fixed-PFA RA success.
Require calibrated RA validation before any RA performance claim.

claim_impact.claim: Prior D5C RA weak fixed-PFA value was reproduced.
Clear physical angle-coordinate bug caused prior RA result.
RA method performance or weak-target weighting success.
